---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE]: "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: ""

---

## ✨ Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## 🎯 Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? What limitation does it address?

## 💡 Proposed Solution
Describe your proposed solution in detail:

- How would this work?
- What would the user experience be like?
- Are there any edge cases to consider?

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered:

- Alternative 1: [description]
- Alternative 2: [description]
- Why is your proposed solution better?

## 📱 Use Cases
Provide specific use cases for this feature:

1. **Use Case 1**: [description]
2. **Use Case 2**: [description]
3. **Use Case 3**: [description]

## 🎨 UI/UX Considerations
If this feature involves UI changes:

- Where should this be located in the interface?
- How should it look and feel?
- Are there any accessibility considerations?
- Should it be responsive?

## 🔧 Technical Implementation
If you have technical ideas:

- What components would need to be modified/created?
- Are there any dependencies or requirements?
- Any performance considerations?
- Would this require database changes?

## 📸 Mockups/Wireframes
If you have any visual ideas, please attach mockups or wireframes.

## 📋 Acceptance Criteria
Define what "done" looks like:

- [ ] Criteria 1
- [ ] Criteria 2
- [ ] Criteria 3

## 🚀 Priority
How important is this feature?

- [ ] Critical - Blocks core functionality
- [ ] High - Major improvement to user experience
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have improvement
- [ ] Low - Minor enhancement

## 🤝 Willing to Contribute
Are you interested in implementing this feature?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to work on this
- [ ] Maybe, with guidance
- [ ] No, I'd prefer the maintainers to handle it

## ✅ Checklist
Please confirm the following:

- [ ] I have searched for existing feature requests
- [ ] I have checked that this feature is not already implemented
- [ ] I have provided enough detail to understand the request
- [ ] I have considered the impact on existing functionality
- [ ] I have filled out all applicable sections of this template

## 📎 Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or files about the feature request here.
